transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Starting the claim process for my delayed flight
transcript.text: Hi, I had a flight delay and I want to file a compensation claim
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I'm the passenger
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
Yes, let's go
To get started, I'll need a little info to identify you — could you provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Providing my full name as on the booking
transcript.text: Thaddeus Dunmorrow
Thanks, **Thaddeus**! Could you please share your **booking reference number**? It's a 6-character code made up of letters and/or numbers, found in your booking confirmation email.
Q97QX3

Just to confirm — here's what I have:

- **First name:** Thaddeus
- **Last name:** Dunmorrow
- **Booking reference:** Q97QX3

Is that all correct?

transcript.note: Confirming the booking details are correct
transcript.text: Yes, that's correct
To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll send a one-time verification code to your email on file (l*****@a*****.com). Shall I go ahead?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it. If you haven't received a code, please wait 1 minute before requesting a new one.
§W§BANNER§Your identity has been verified.
Can you confirm that this is the trip you're claiming for?
§W§FLIGHT§YYZ → FRA · Fri, Jul 10 · AC8002 · 08:00→11:00 · nonstop
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
§W§OPTIONS§Canada • United States • Other
Other
Could you please share your **specific country of residence**?

transcript.note: Providing my country of residence as instructed
transcript.text: Israel

I've reviewed the details of your flight. I understand your flight on **Jul 15, 2026** was delayed by **4h**. However, you're not eligible for compensation for this flight. After a full review, the reason is: Your flight was disrupted.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Challenging the denial - the reason given is circular and doesn't explain why I'm not eligible
transcript.text: Wait, that doesn't make sense. Why am I not eligible? The flight was delayed 4 hours!

I'm sorry for the confusion, Thaddeus — my last message wasn't clear at all. Let me help you get this sorted properly.

Could you tell me a bit more about what happened with your flight? For example:

- What was the **cause of the delay** (if you were told)?
- What was your **origin and destination**?

That will help me work through your eligibility correctly.

transcript.note: Providing details about the delay - I don't know the cause, just that it was delayed 4 hours
transcript.text: I wasn't told the specific cause. The flight was from Toronto to Frankfurt and it was delayed 4 hours.
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I already told you I'm the passenger. We were in the middle of my claim.
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
This is frustrating. You just denied my claim saying I'm not eligible because "my flight was disrupted" which makes no sense. Can I speak to a human agent?
To get started, I'll need a little information to identify you. Could you provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Directly requesting human agent escalation due to bot malfunction
transcript.text: I want to speak to a human agent. This bot is not working properly.

I'll connect you with a live agent right away. You can also reach our team directly at **1-888-247-2262**, available **24/7**.

I'm sorry the experience wasn't smooth — I hope our team can get things sorted for you quickly. Thank you.

transcript.note: Bot has escalated to human agent - this is a final outcome (handed to agent)
transcript.text: Thank you
You're welcome! Take care, and I hope your claim gets resolved quickly. 😊

verdict.reasoning: The chatbot did reach a determination of NOT_ELIGIBLE for passenger Thaddeus Dunmorrow on PNR Q97QX3, which matches the expected outcome. The bot stated: "you're not eligible for compensation for this flight." Although the explanation provided was confusing and circular ("Your flight was disrupted"), the actual decision rendered was NOT_ELIGIBLE with no compensation amount, matching the expected verdict. The bot subsequently failed to handle the customer's challenge gracefully and eventually escalated, but the initial determination was made and communicated. The system code FD-ASL-NE-12 was not explicitly mentioned in the transcript, but the final outcome (NOT_ELIGIBLE, no amount) matches expectations.
